message:
fix: secret scan + export silently skip legacy NULL-agent conversations

Two more batches of user-visible queries that inner-joined agents:

src/pages/secret_scan.rs — three queries (conversation loop, message
loop, snippet loop) all dropped any conversation whose agent_id was
NULL.  For a security scanner this is the worst failure mode: a leaked
credential in a legacy conversation would never be surfaced because
the scan loop never even sees the row.  Switched all three to LEFT
JOIN + COALESCE(a.slug, 'unknown').

src/pages/export.rs — the conversations source query in the export
path had the same INNER JOIN, so exported archives silently omitted
legacy NULL-agent rows.  Switched to LEFT JOIN + COALESCE and rewrote
the a.slug IN (...) agent filter as an EXISTS guard against a2 so the
filter still operates correctly without the joined column.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
